Mtn To Reconsider Court Order Of 9/9/14
Off Calendar Oct-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alan R. Lipton, Esq., (219-508-4700), for Richard Denola, Defendant and moving party.
Robert J. Sheppard, Esq. of Sheppard Uziel Sussman & Rosen, (415-296-0900 x23), for Kathleen Cappetti, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Hearing is held. Defendant presents oral arguments supporting its motion. Plaintiff's counsel responds to the Court's inquiry that plaintiff's counsel will remain the attorney of record for the Plaintiff and Plaintiff will get another attorney for arbitration purposes. Court hears arguments re lifting of the stay and issues on arbitration. DEFENDANT RICHARD DENOLA's Motion To Reconsider Court Order Of 9/9/14 is taken under submission. Both sides are ordered to submit proposed orders today. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert J. Sheppard, Esq. of Sheppard, Uziel, Sussman & Rosen, (415-296-0900 x23), for Kathleen Cappetti, Plaintiff and opposing party.
No appearance by Defendant and moving party.

Plaintiff through its counsel agrees with the Court's ruling to send this case to arbitration. Plaintiff argues re one arbitrator to handle properties in San Francisco and other counties. Plaintiff requests Court not to rule on striking Complaint but either to stay or abate it.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT RICHARD DENOLA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. Proposed order is submitted in open court for Court's review. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

At 10:25am, Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT RICHARD DENOLA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED, shall be treated as a Motion to Stay and Abate. See details in the signed scanned order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
